title: Racosperma sorophyllum
taxonomy: Racosperma sorophyllum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Western Australia, and its classification is part of a larger group of plants that are often referred to as acacia. The species is now considered to be a synonym of Acacia sorophylla, and its classification is subject to ongoing research and revision. The classification of Racosperma sorophyllum reflects the complex and evolving nature of plant taxonomy. Racosperma sorophyllum's classification is also influenced by its unique characteristics and relationships with other plant species within the Fabaceae family.
